python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
for p in sorted(Path('/home/ubuntu/.pm2/logs').glob('mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge-out*.log')):
    lines=p.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines()
    print('FILE', p.name, 'N', len(lines))
    for ln in lines[-25:]:
        print(ln.encode('ascii','ignore').decode())
PY

sudo -u ubuntu bash -lc 'pm2 jlist' | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d||'[]');const p=j.find(x=>x.name==='mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge');console.log('status='+(p&&p.pm2_env&&p.pm2_env.status));console.log('uptime='+(p?Math.floor((Date.now()-p.pm2_env.pm_uptime)/1000): -1));});"
